name: fugunano
description: Fugunano multi-runtime agent coding workflow: fuguectl + typed engine + bounded review-fix loop
author: BicaMind Labs

scripts.test:engine:ci: cd engine && npm ci && npm run check
scripts.test: npm run test:plugin && npm run test:fuguectl
scripts.ci: npm run scan && npm run lint:launchers && npm run check:docs && npm test && npm run test:engine
scripts.ci:clean: npm run scan && npm run lint:launchers && npm run check:docs && npm test && npm run test:engine:ci
